message:
feat(search): add SQL plan search for Agent/Project doc kinds, cursor pagination, and query facets

Route Agent and Project doc-kind searches through a new SQL plan-based
path (execute_sql_plan_search) instead of the full-text search pipeline,
since these queries are pure metadata lookups. Add cursor-based
pagination with apply_cursor_window() to all search engine paths. Add
collect_query_facets() for richer explain metadata. Use a process-local
temp directory for the Tantivy search index so concurrent test binaries
don't contend on a shared lockfile. Fix two_tier ScoredEntry ordering
to prefer lower indices on tie. Clean up temp files on failed symlink
renames in index_layout.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
